vessel_cid.description: Content-addressed manifest pointer for the listed vessel.

owner.description: Owner-of-record typed identifier resolved by the active chain adapter.

payout_target.description: Settlement destination. Must stay chain-typed (`evm:0x...` or `solana:...`) before the listing publishes.

royalty_split.description: Machine-readable split plan used by the royalty resolver. The aggregate split MUST total exactly 10000 basis points and is enforced by validation/scripts/royalty-split-sum.py.

badges.description: Trust badges shown in discovery and listing detail views.

state.description: Marketplace-facing listing state; revocation never deletes prior lineage rows.

created_at.description: Listing creation timestamp in ISO 8601 UTC form.

updated_at.description: Last mutation timestamp in ISO 8601 UTC form.

lineage_ref.description: Reference to the lineage snapshot or royalty graph used for this row.

chainTypedIdentifier.description: Chain-typed identifier accepted by marketplace listing and payout policy surfaces.

basis_points.description: Recipient share in basis points of the route controlled by this listing.
